command:
You are part of an autonomous LLM innovator framework. Do not fallback to a generic transformer template. Study inspirations critically, declare borrowed mechanisms, and preserve originality. Produce a phase-aware plan for idea idea-0003.

Injected skill directives:
- ml-pipeline-orchestrator: Patterns for structured experiment flow and reproducible ML pipelines.
  When to use: Use when translating an idea into a tracked sequence of phases and retries.
  Output: pipeline-structure
- architecture-research-synthesizer: Distill inspirations into design constraints, opportunities, and anti-copy notes.
  When to use: Use when the planner studies external ideas and needs original synthesis.
  Workflow: Read the idea brief and any cited inspirations.

Forbidden skills: pytorch-lightning

Review requirements:
- Document anti-copy notes when public inspirations are used.
- Record which missing skills were identified versus actually approved.

Idea ID: idea-0003
Role: planner
Phase: smoke
Goal: Translate the idea brief into an implementation and experiment plan.

Brief:
Invent a topology-mixed language model with recurrent routing and originality locks.

Hypothesis: This idea can improve a general-purpose LM by exploring: invent topology-mixed language recurrent routing originality locks.
Target model: general-purpose autoregressive language model
Tokenizer: gpt2

Novelty claims:
- Combine non-default mechanisms around: invent, topology-mixed, language, recurrent
- Reject template decoder-only stacks with only cosmetic changes.
- Use explicit originality rationale before implementation starts.

Forbidden fallback patterns:
- vanilla transformer
- plain transformer
- copy gpt
- standard decoder-only stack
- default llama clone

Training curriculum outline:
- Smoke-test reduced variant near 600,000,000 parameters for math and logic.
- Run a learnability check on the target-scale model with a small training subset.
- Escalate to a production-like corpus only after the agent records why the idea looks promising.

Use the injected skill directives above as compact operating guidance.

guardrails: Do not auto-install any discovered skill during autonomous experiments.
active_skills.name: find-skills
active_skills.summary: Discover future skill gaps and catalog candidates from the public directory.
trigger_conditions: Use when the planner needs to identify missing skills or future capability gaps.

guardrails: Do not let orchestration advice override originality requirements.
active_skills.name: ml-pipeline-orchestrator
active_skills.summary: Patterns for structured experiment flow and reproducible ML pipelines.
trigger_conditions: Use when translating an idea into a tracked sequence of phases and retries.

guardrails: Convert inspirations into constraints and recombination options, not copy recipes.
active_skills.name: architecture-research-synthesizer
active_skills.summary: Distill inspirations into design constraints, opportunities, and anti-copy notes.
trigger_conditions: Use when the planner studies external ideas and needs original synthesis.

guardrails: Do not let orchestration advice override originality requirements.
injected_skills.name: ml-pipeline-orchestrator
injected_skills.summary: Patterns for structured experiment flow and reproducible ML pipelines.
trigger_conditions: Use when translating an idea into a tracked sequence of phases and retries.

guardrails: Convert inspirations into constraints and recombination options, not copy recipes.
injected_skills.name: architecture-research-synthesizer
injected_skills.summary: Distill inspirations into design constraints, opportunities, and anti-copy notes.
trigger_conditions: Use when the planner studies external ideas and needs original synthesis.

architecture-research-synthesizer: Distill inspirations into design constraints, opportunities, and anti-copy notes.
When to use: Use when the planner studies external ideas and needs original synthesis.
Workflow: Read the idea brief and any cited inspirations.
Workflow: Extract useful mechanisms, training lessons, and open questions.
ml-pipeline-orchestrator: Patterns for structured experiment flow and reproducible ML pipelines.
When to use: Use when translating an idea into a tracked sequence of phases and retries.
Guardrail: Do not let orchestration advice override originality requirements.

skipped_skills.name: find-skills
skipped_skills.reason: Only inject when the planner is explicitly searching for missing capabilities.
